questions.question: Which two parties signed a landmark Digital Trade Agreement (DTA) in May 2025 to deepen digital and economic cooperation?

India developed its first indigenous Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) machine, set to be installed at __________.
questions.option_1: All Indian Institute of Medical Sciences, Raipur
questions.option_2: All Indian Institute of Medical Sciences, Delhi
questions.option_3: All Indian Institute of Medical Sciences, Nagpur
questions.option_4: All Indian Institute of Medical Sciences, Bhopal

questions.question: What was the theme of National Technology Day celebrated in India in May 2025?
questions.option_1: Digital India: Empowering Through Smart Technologies
questions.option_2: YANTRA – Yugantar for Advancing New Technology, Research & Acceleration
questions.option_3: Towards a Self-Reliant India through Science and Technology
questions.option_4: Powering India through Innovation and Research

questions.question: From which site did ISRO conduct its 100ᵗʰ space launch?

The 'Atmanirbhar Oil Seeds Abhiyan' launched in Budget 2025 focuses on:
questions.option_4: importing high-quality seeds for oil production

questions.question: Which major initiative was approved by the Indian government in May 2025 to strengthen the country’s defence capabilities?
questions.option_1: Deployment of nuclear submarines in the Indian Ocean
questions.option_2: Establishment of new army divisions along the northern border
questions.option_4: Development of a fifth-generation twin-engine stealth fighter jet

In 2025, which of the following disputes between two countries escalated due to increased military activities near the Line of Actual Control (LAC)?
questions.option_4: India–Sri Lanka dispute over Katchatheevu Island

questions.question: How many new judges were sworn-in to the Supreme Court of India on 30 May 2025?

questions.option_3: Council of Scientific and Industrial Research (CSIR)
